waiting_for: Price to stabilize after massive 289-point counter-trend surge; need clear setup formation - either mean reversion short setup if price rejects near 30700/30800, or trend-following long if EMAs begin turning up with pullback support

long_assessment.reasoning: NO LONG SETUP - Price exploded 289 points above all EMAs (EMA21 30397, EMA75 30406, EMA150 30417) in a single bar, creating massive extension. While bearish FVG above at 30791-30805 (105 pts away) and psychological 30700 (4.75 pts) could attract price higher, trading long against bearish EMA alignment with price this extended is chasing. Stochastic at 60 has room but no oversold bounce catalyst. Risk of sharp mean reversion to EMAs is high. No defined risk level with reasonable R/R.

short_assessment.reasoning: NO SHORT SETUP - Previous short setup (waiting for break below 30400/EMA rejection) is COMPLETELY INVALIDATED by 289-point surge to 30695. EMAs still bearish aligned but price is 288+ points above them - shorting this parabolic extension risks 'catching a rocket.' Nearest bullish FVG target at 30373 is 317 points away (too far for practical target). No nearby bearish FVG to target for a short (nearest is 105 pts ABOVE at 30791). Psychological 30700 just 4.75 pts away could trigger more shorts but also squeeze higher. Need price to stabilize and form a proper rejection pattern before considering mean reversion short.
